visual_description: A man in a dark jacket and red shirt holds a handgun, pointing it forward with his right hand while his left arm is extended outward. Another man in a dark shirt stands with his right arm raised, holding a handgun pointed toward the first man. The scene is dimly lit with artificial lights, and the background shows blurred signs and objects, suggesting an indoor or urban setting.
